text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm heading over to my office...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
"Rain or shine, heaven or hell... I'll bring the
thunder!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's not it. I've gotta be more like... "I'll
bring the THUNDERRR!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Urk! H-h-how long have you been there?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You better not tell anyone about this! Getting
caught practicing how to be cool is like the
uncoolest thing ever!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that line's actually way cooler than it
sounded just now. I just haven't perfected it yet!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's from a scene in my favorite delinquent
manga where the protag vows to overthrow the
top brass and declares war on the boss.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: They're all like, "Rain or shine, heaven or hell... I'll bring the thunder!" Maaaan! Talk about cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't sound right when I say it, y'know? I
dunno, I don't feel like I'm being... menacing
enough. Hm...
choice_data_list: Try making yourself look more threatening.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Make myself look more threatening, huh? I never
thought of that! The characters in the manga are
all swole, so that could work!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I get jacked like them, I might be able to see
the world from their perspective!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm sold! Time to get ripped! Thanks for the tip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I hear around school that Vodka's
been hitting the gym with renewed vigor.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Intimidating poses, huh? I guess they do strike
some sweet poses in the manga...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How's this? Or maybe somethin' like this?
Whaddabout this? Man, posing actually uses a lot
of muscles!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gettin' all pumped now! Y'know what? I'mma
bring my mirror over. Thanks for the tip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's deep dive into posing apparently
continues late into the night.
